params.context: h2_end_stream=0 (NO END_STREAM). Code analysis revealed: h2_end_stream=1 sends DATA+END_STREAM simultaneously in single SSL_write → Chrome SSE parser can't process events before stream closes. h2_end_stream=0 keeps stream open → browser parses SSE in streaming mode. This is the pattern genspark (DONE service) uses successfully. etapd reload confirmed 19:52:33.

check_details.key_difference_from_529: #529 had h2_end_stream=1 (DATA+END_STREAM simultaneous → Chrome 0 bytes). #530 has h2_end_stream=0 (stream stays open → SSE streaming parse).
check_details.expected_behavior: Warning text appears in chat area. Stream stays open (loading indicator acceptable).
devtools_check_instructions: 4. Check the FIRST blocked request: Response tab should show SSE data
5. Check size column: should be >0 bytes
7. SCREENSHOT chat area showing warning or error
